IOP Jackal.flavor: The Jackal is IOP Manufacturing's light utility vehicle.
IOP Jackal.description:
Standard Equipment

  • Open roof with roll cage
  • Spare tire mount
  • Two forward seats, two jump seats
  • Light cargo bed

Ural-4320 Cargo Truck.description:
Standard Equipment

  • Flatbed (12 ton)
  • Winch (5 ton)

Common Mods

  • Improvised armor (+1 armor)
  • Bed-mounted HMG (needs passenger gunner)

Svarog Minotaurus.crew_notes: Driver + gunner/commander. Cannot fire with only a driver.
Svarog Minotaurus.description:
Standard Equipment

  • Roof RWS (7.62mm MG)
  • Smoke grenade launchers
  • CBRN seal
  • Run-flat tires

Crew

  • Driver: Cannot operate weapons.
  • Gunner/Commander: Operates RWS. Cannot drive.
  • Driver only: move but no fire.

BTR-90 Berkut.crew_notes: Driver + gunner. Commander removes +1 TN self-targeting penalty.
BTR-90 Berkut.description:
Standard Equipment

  • 14.5mm KPVT HMG
  • 7.62mm PKT coaxial MG
  • Amphibious (8 km/h)
  • NV optics
  • NBC protection

Crew

  • Driver: No weapons.
  • Gunner: Turret weapons.
  • Commander: Target acquisition.
  • 2 crew: +1 TN. 3 crew: normal. Driver only: move only.

Girard Meridian.flavor: Most common civilian car in URNC territory.

UAS Wanderer.flavor: High-roof panel van. Courier and light transport.
UAS Wanderer.description:
Standard Equipment

  • High roof, flat floor
  • Sliding door + barn doors
  • Cargo tie-downs
  • Cargo HVAC

WW3-Era HMMWV.crew_notes: Driver + separate gunner for roof mount.

weapons.name: M240 Medium Machine Gun
weapons.notes: Passenger operates exposed through roof hatch.

WW3-Era HMMWV.description:
Standard Equipment

  • Roof ring with M240
  • Fold-down windshield
  • Truck bed (2 jump seats)

Crew

  • Driver: Cannot fire roof weapon.
  • Gunner: Exposed while firing.
  • Driver only: weapon unusable.

Sangvis Ripper Scout.crew_notes: Pilot operates all systems. +1 TN while moving.

weapons.name: Hardpoint Mount
weapons.notes: Light weapon or sensor. Stationary: normal. Moving: +1 TN.

Sangvis Ripper Scout.description:
Standard Equipment

  • Four-legged walker
  • Pilot cockpit
  • Sensors (NV, thermal, motion)
  • Hardpoint mount

M151 Light Utility.description:
Standard Equipment

  • Open 4-seat cabin, canvas roof
  • Small cargo bed
  • Basic radio

Oshkosh HET Recovery.description:
Standard Equipment

  • Hydraulic trailer (70 ton)
  • Winch (20 ton)
  • Armored cab
  • Tool locker

GKN Simba.crew_notes: Driver + gunner/commander. Cannot fire with only a driver.

weapons.name: Turret Ring Mount
weapons.notes: LMG, MMG, or AGL. Gunner inside.

GKN Simba.description:
Standard Equipment

  • Turret ring mount
  • Sloped steel armor
  • Run-flat tires

SF Raptor.crew_notes: Operator/pilot flies remotely. A cramped internal compartment or external ride points allow up to 2 passengers in extreme discomfort.

weapons.name: Twin Hardpoints
weapons.notes: Rockets, missiles, or MG pods. 500 cr reload.

SF Raptor.flavor: Refitted Sangvis Ferri tilt-rotor attack drone. Large enough to carry a pilot and passengers in a cramped compartment, or serve as a carrier for external ride points.
SF Raptor.description:
Standard Equipment

  • Twin hardpoints
  • Tilt-rotor VTOL
  • 3 km control range
  • Optical targeting system

Notes

  • Can carry up to 2 passengers in a cramped internal compartment. Passengers cannot perform actions requiring significant movement.
  • Can be operated remotely with no onboard crew (frees the compartment for cargo).
  • Replacement cost: 15,000 cr.

weapons.name: Hardpoints (x2)
weapons.notes: Light stores. Co-pilot operates. 3 hr fuel.

UAS Carrier.description:
Standard Equipment

  • Sliding doors
  • 6 seats
  • 500 kg cargo
  • 2 external hardpoints

weapons.name: Hardpoints (x4)
weapons.notes: Medium stores. Co-pilot operates. 6 hr fuel.

Svarog Kite.description:
Standard Equipment

  • Armored crew compartment
  • Ducted fan VTOL
  • Flare/chaff dispenser
  • 4 hardpoints
  • CBRN seal

T-90M3 Kontora.crew_notes: Commander, gunner, driver, loader (autoloader can substitute). Commander needed for target acquisition.

weapons.name: 125mm 2A82M Cannon
weapons.notes: Autoloader (22 rds). Gunner operates. Cannot fire while moving.

weapons.name: PKT Coaxial MG
weapons.notes: Linked to main gun. Same gunner.

weapons.name: 12.7mm Kord HMG
weapons.notes: Commander operates. Independent of main turret.

T-90M3 Kontora.flavor: Post-WW3 MBT. 125mm cannon, ERA, composite armor. Strategic asset.
T-90M3 Kontora.description:
Standard Equipment

  • 125mm 2A82M cannon (autoloader)
  • 7.62mm PKT coaxial MG
  • 12.7mm Kord HMG (commander)
  • Composite armor + ERA
  • NBC protection
  • Thermal imaging

Crew

  • Commander: Target acquisition, cupola HMG.
  • Gunner: Main gun + coaxial MG.
  • Driver: Drives only.
  • Loader: Replaced by autoloader in emergencies.
  • 3 crew minimum: commander + gunner + driver.

AA-02 Sinner.crew_notes: Single pilot. Neural interface allows one person to operate all systems.

weapons.name: Twin 30mm Autocannons
weapons.notes: AP and HE ammo selectable. Pilot operates via neural link.

weapons.name: Energy Shield
weapons.notes: +2 armor vs front arc. 3 uses per scene.

AA-02 Sinner.flavor: KCCO bipedal mech. 6m tall, neural interface, energy shield.
AA-02 Sinner.description:
Standard Equipment

  • Twin 30mm autocannon arms
  • Shoulder missile pods (6 tubes)
  • Energy shield (+2 armor front arc)
  • Booster system
  • Sealed cockpit
  • Multi-spectral sensors

Crew

  • Pilot: Neural interface operates all systems. No additional crew needed.

SF Manticore.crew_notes: Driver + gunner. Cannot fire with only a driver.

weapons.name: 152mm Howitzer
weapons.notes: Indirect fire capable. 12 rounds. 3,000 cr per reload. Gunner operates.

SF Manticore.flavor: Sangvis Ferri heavy walker. Four-legged artillery platform.
SF Manticore.description:
Standard Equipment

  • 152mm howitzer (under-slung)
  • 7.62mm coaxial MG
  • Four-legged walker locomotion
  • Stabilized firing platform
  • Armored crew cabin (2)

URNC Argo.crew_notes: Gunner/operator + locomotive engineer. Cannot fire while moving if locomotive is unattended.

weapons.name: Retractable Turret Mount
weapons.notes: Accepts MMG or AGL. Gunner operates from inside. Retracts for full cover.

URNC Argo.flavor: Armored rail car. Bunker on rails. Requires locomotive.
URNC Argo.description:
Standard Equipment

  • Retractable turret mount
  • Steel armor plate
  • 4 firing ports per side
  • Internal bunks (6), workstation
  • CBRN seal

Crew

  • Gunner/Operator: Turret and internal systems.
  • Engineer: Operates locomotive (if attached). Without engineer, car is stationary.
